title: [skip-ci] Update dawidd6/action-send-mail action to v3.12.0

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>dawidd6/action-send-mail (dawidd6/action-send-mail)</summary>

### [`v3.12.0`](https://togithub.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/releases/tag/v3.12.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/compare/v3.11.0...v3.12.0)

##### What's Changed

-   build(deps): bump nodemailer from 6.9.8 to 6.9.9 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/195](https://togithub.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/195)
-   Fix for issue [#​196](https://togithub.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/issues/196) by [@​kroese](https://togithub.com/kroese) in [https://github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/197](https://togithub.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/197)
-   build(deps): bump nodemailer from 6.9.9 to 6.9.10 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/199](https://togithub.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/199)
-   build(deps): bump nodemailer from 6.9.10 to 6.9.12 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/202](https://togithub.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/202)
-   build(deps): bump nodemailer from 6.9.12 to 6.9.13 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/204](https://togithub.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/204)

##### New Contributors

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *renovate[bot]* **Once this PR has been reviewed and has the lgtm label**, please assign [giuseppe](https://github.com/giuseppe) for approval. For more information see [the Kubernetes Code Review Process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process). The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@cevich what is the purpose of renovate doing a [skip-ci] here ?

> what is the purpose of renovate doing a [skip-ci] here ?

It's updating a github action for which there are no tests, nor any way to run the workflow inside a PR anyway.  It will make the `tide` bot unhappy, but we don't update these things often so :man_shrugging:
